# Chainlink DTA Technical Standard

> Product-level navigation index for the Digital Transfer Agent (DTA) technical standard.

Use these pages to understand architecture, actors, and lifecycle flows.

- [Overview](https://docs.chain.link/dta-technical-standard.md)
- [How It Works](https://docs.chain.link/dta-technical-standard/how-it-works.md)
